title: Backend - Fluxo Completo de Dados
description: Cria um mandado, edita e verifica a persistência no backend via interface.

steps.description: Click the "Novo Mandado" button or navigate to http://localhost:3000/#/new-warrant
Fill name field with "TESTE BACKEND TOOL"
Click the Save button to create the warrant
Once saved, locate the new warrant and open its details
Click the "Priorizar" button to test the backend PATCH
Verify the toast message confirms synchronization with the backend
